reviews.comment:
Amo el ACA SOMOS AMIGOS DESDE 1966 donde el GPS era el planito que te daban ay salir de la estación del ACA que eligieras donde fuera  ellos te esperaban con el mejor servicio Río grande Rada Tilli  Cachi y muchísimo más

(Translated by Google)
I love ACA. WE HAVE BEEN FRIENDS SINCE 1966. When the GPS was the little map they gave you, and when you left the ACA station of your choice, wherever it was, they were waiting for you with the best service: Río Grande, Rada, Tilli, Cachi, and much more.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtazdIZmd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No funciona las 24hs, casualmente entre la 1 y 6 am nunca tienen combustible. Fui a hacer el cambio de aceite, te quieren cobrar extra por cualquier cosa, me ofrecieron el escaneo, me lo cobraron pero no lo hicieron (estuvieron 40 minutos para "imprimir" el informe luego de que inicie el reclamo). No lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
It's not open 24 hours, and conveniently, they never have fuel between 1 and 6 am. I went to get my oil changed, and they try to charge extra for everything. They offered me a scan, charged me for it, but didn't do it (it took them 40 minutes to "print" the report after I filed a complaint). I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtc0stU1lREAE
